titleStmt.title: SII 37.57: original edition by S. Nagarjuna and K. Munirathnam
No. 57. (A.R. No. B 369 of 1938-39.) Dēvuni-Cuddapah, Cuddapah Taluk, Cuddapah District.

summary.p: North wall of the Venkatēśa Perumal temple.
This is dated Śaka 1476 (current), Pramādīcha, Kārttīka śu. 12, corresponding to 1553 A.D., October 18, Wednesday.

Damaged. It records the gift of land in Kadapa made to god Tiruveṅgalanātha of the village by mahā-maṇḍalēśvara Pina Avubhaḷarjāja, son of Peda-Vōbularāja and grandson of Nandyāla Avubhaḷaraja for the worship of the god.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu . svasti . śrī jayābhyudaya śālivāhana śakavarṣaṁbulu 1476 Agunēṭi pramādīca saṁvatsara kārtika śu 12 lu . manmahārājādhirājaparamēśvara śrīvīrapratāpa śrī vīrasadā
śivadēvamahārāyalu vijayanagaramaṁdu vajra śiṁhāsanārūḍhuḍai prithivi sāmrājyaṁ sēyucuṁḍaṁgānu Akhilāṁḍakōṭi braṁhāṁḍanāyakuḍaina dēvadēvōttamulāyna kaḍapa tiruveṁgaḷanādhadēvuniki dēva
ra dāsānu dāsulaina śrīmanmahāmaṁḍalēśvara naṁdyāla Avubhaḷarājugāri pautrulaina pedavōbuḷrājugāri putrulaina pina Avubhaḷrājugāru samarppiṁccina bhūdāna śāsana patra kramameṭlannanu sadāsivadēva mahārāyalu māku
nāyaṁkarānaku pāliṁccina vudayagiri cāvaḍiki celle gaṁḍikōṭa simalōni kaḍapa grāmamaṁddu yī tadhātidhi vuddhāna dvādasi puṇyakālamaṁddu samarppiṁccinadi . kālvurāmayapalleku paṭapara yāṁtaṁ staḷaṁ vanaṁ
ṁ sana lu veriśi nā svāmi kaiṁkaryānaku mā tiruveṁgaḷanāthaniki kaṁgānu samarppiṁccina bhūdharmmaśāsanapatraṁ
Digital edition of SII 37.57 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
